title: Ledger Entry
description: The Ledger Entry is produced by Stage 8 (Audit Ledger) of the Governed Execution Protocol. It records an immutable, hash-linked entry in the append-only audit ledger. Each entry references the receipt it records and the hash of the previous ledger entry, forming a tamper-evident chain. Ledger entries are consumed by the Governed Corpus for decision-history analysis, by auditors for compliance verification, and by cross-domain verification processes for inter-system proof exchange.

ledger_entry_id.description: Unique identifier for this ledger entry (UUID v4)

receipt_id.description: Reference to the receipt recorded by this ledger entry

receipt_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the canonical JSON representation of the referenced receipt

previous_ledger_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the immediately preceding ledger entry, forming the append-only hash chain

timestamp.description: UTC Unix timestamp in milliseconds when this ledger entry was appended

ledger_signature.description: ECDSA-secp256k1 signature over the canonical JSON representation of this entry (excluding the ledger_signature field itself)
